rewritten_question_text: Two long, thin straight wires \(A\) and \(B\) carry currents \(I_A = 1\,\text{A}\) and \(I_B = 2\,\text{A}\), respectively, with the current directions and positions as shown in the image. title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: The figure shows the single line diagram of a power system with a double circuit transmission line. The expression for electrical power is \(1.5 \sin \delta\), where \(\delta\) is the rotor angle. The system is operating at the stable equilibrium point with mechanical power equal to 1 pu. If one of the transmission line circuits is removed, the maximum value of \(\delta\) as the rotor swings is 1.221 radian. If the expression for electrical power with one transmission line circuit removed is \(P_{\text{max}} \sin \delta\), what is the value of \(P_{\text{max}}\), in pu?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题（1）
rewritten_question_text: In the circuit shown in the figure, it is found that the input AC voltage \(V_i\) and current \(i\) are in phase. The coupling coefficient is \(K = \frac{M}{\sqrt{L_1 L_2}}\), where \(M\) is the mutual inductance between the two coils. What is the value of \(K\)?

title: EEE-Bench 子题 1
rewritten_question_text:
For a 3-phase transmission line, the voltage drop is given by
$$
\left[\begin{array}{l}
\Delta V_a \\
\Delta V_b \\
\Delta V_c
\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{lll}
Z_s & Z_m & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_s & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_m & Z_s
\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}
I_a \\
I_b \\
I_c
\end{array}\right]
$$
The shunt capacitance of the line can be neglected. If the line has a positive sequence impedance of 15 \,\Omega and a zero sequence impedance of 48 \,\Omega, what is the value of \(Z_s\)?

title: EEE-Bench 子题 2
rewritten_question_text:
For a 3-phase transmission line, the voltage drop is given by
$$
\left[\begin{array}{l}
\Delta V_a \\
\Delta V_b \\
\Delta V_c
\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{lll}
Z_s & Z_m & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_s & Z_m \\
Z_m & Z_m & Z_s
\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}
I_a \\
I_b \\
I_c
\end{array}\right]
$$
The shunt capacitance of the line can be neglected. If the line has a positive sequence impedance of 15 \,\Omega and a zero sequence impedance of 48 \,\Omega, what is the value of \(Z_m\)?
